text: Asian Stocks Drop After Chip Selloff, Oil Gains: Markets Wrap - Bloomberg.com
fullText: Asian stocks fell alongside US equity-index futures as a selloff in chipmakers deepened on mounting concern that massive artificial-intelligence investments may not justify lofty valuations. Oil climbed.
